overall.description: Gameplay footage from Shadow of the Tomb Raider showing Lara Croft exploring a Mesoamerican jungle village with stone architecture, swimming through a water pool, and approaching an ancient temple complex. The clip transitions from bright outdoor village exploration to a dark temple interior with stealth elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: jungle village courtyard with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the village courtyard, observing the surroundings and passing near a working villager

notable_agents.action: villager kneeling near a basket, working on the ground

entered.detail: rough stone wall forming courtyard boundary with moss and vegetation
wooden structure with thatched roof typical of jungle settlements
tropical trees with dense green foliage providing shade
simple wooden barrier made of vertical posts

segments.scene_description: Lara Croft walks through a jungle village courtyard surrounded by stone walls and wooden huts. The area is shaded by dense tropical trees. A villager kneels near a basket on the left side, working. The ground is dirt with scattered vegetation.

events.description: character enters the water and transitions from walking to swimming

agents.ego_description: walking down a path toward a pool of water, then entering and swimming through the clear blue water

notable_agents.action: villager in white clothing walking along the path

entered.detail: clear blue water pool surrounded by stone walls and rocks
ancient stone steps leading up from the water's edge
stone arch bridge spanning across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow path toward a water pool, passing a villager. At 16 seconds, she enters the water and begins swimming. A stone arch bridge is visible in the distance to the left, and stone stairs lead up from the far side of the pool.

events.description: character exits water and begins ascending stone stairs

agents.ego_description: swimming through the water channel, then climbing out onto stone stairs and ascending alongside a high stone wall

entered.detail: distant stone temple structures visible through the trees and mist

segments.scene_description: Lara swims through the narrow water channel between stone walls. At 25 seconds, she exits the water and begins climbing ancient stone stairs. In the distance, large temple ruins become visible through the jungle foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path leading to temple complex entrance

events.description: approaching the large stone gate entrance to the temple complex

agents.ego_description: walking along the village path toward the temple entrance, passing wooden huts and villagers

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a wooden hut entrance

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance with thick wooden doors and carved pillars
rustic wooden structure with thatched roof and stone foundation
two guards in ceremonial masks flanking the stone gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through the upper village area, passing wooden huts. The stone gate of the temple complex looms ahead, flanked by guards in ceremonial masks. Ancient ruins are visible on the left in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance plaza with ceremonial bridge

events.description: passing through the stone gate into the temple complex plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone gate and approaching the main red temple structure across a stone bridge

notable_agents.action: temple guard in green mask and ceremonial dress standing watch

entered.detail: large red and stone temple structure with ornate carvings and golden decorations
stone walkway leading across water to the temple entrance
waterfall cascading down rocks beside the temple structure

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone gate, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza with a magnificent red temple ahead. A stone bridge leads across the water to the temple entrance, flanked by guards in elaborate masks. A waterfall cascades down the rocks to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior with ceremonial stairs and torch lighting

events.description: entering the temple interior through the large wooden door
environment shifts from bright daylight to dim interior illuminated by wall torches

agents.ego_description: entering the dark temple interior wearing a green outfit and mask, proceeding cautiously up stairs past fallen bodies

entered.detail: large wooden door with metal fittings that closes behind
long stone staircase ascending into the dark interior
wall-mounted torches providing warm flickering light
fallen bodies in red clothing lying on the stairs
large stone guardian statues flanking the base of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple through a heavy wooden door, transitioning to a dark interior lit by wall torches. Now wearing a green outfit and mask, she ascends a long stone staircase flanked by guardian statues, passing bodies of fallen individuals in red clothing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a shaded jungle village through a water channel and finally into the dark depths of an ancient temple. It begins with Lara Croft walking through a courtyard of stone walls and wooden huts under a dense tropical canopy, passing a kneeling villager before descending a narrow path. As she enters a water pool, the camera follows her swimming through a narrow stone channel and climbing a set of ancient stairs that reveal looming temple ruins through the foliage. The scene then expands as she passes through a guarded stone gate into a sunlit plaza featuring a magnificent red temple, a stone bridge, and a cascading waterfall. Finally, the environment shifts abruptly from bright daylight to a torch-lit interior as she enters through a heavy wooden door, ascending a long staircase flanked by guardian statues and fallen figures.
